title: Demon Lord, Retry!
sourceNotes: 12-episode 2019 adaptation of Kurone Kanzaki's light novel; the chapter source of truth is Amaru Minotake's manga (5 vols, 27 ch, FINISHED), which the anime fully adapts across its run. Chapter anchors come from community sync notes (ep1=ch1, ep2=ch2-3, ep3=ch4-5, ep8=ch11-12, ep9=ch12-14); remaining episode boundaries are extrapolated and APPROXIMATE. The 2024 sequel series 'Demon Lord, Retry! R' (AniList anime id 168500) adapts the separate 'R' manga continuity and is out of scope for this mapping.

mappings.arc: The Demon Lord's Descent & Founding Rabbi Village (Vol. 1)
The Hot Spring Resort & the Satanist Cult's Attack (Vol. 2)
